data.name: 29歲的人妻想成為職業coser是否搞錯了什麼？
data.detailed_description:
關於

「這一次，換我站在你的舞台背後，成為最閃亮的那道光。」 

 

她是一位熱愛 Cosplay 的人妻，正邁入 20 多歲的最後一年。

這一年，她立下目標：成為一名受歡迎的職業 Cosplayer，閃耀於螢光幕前。

而你，是她的丈夫，也是她最重要的夥伴。

在這段既夢幻又現實的旅程中，

你將一邊協助她經營社群、拍攝作品、與粉絲互動，

一邊面對名氣與慾望帶來的試煉。

這是一款結合 戀愛模擬 × Cosplay 經營 × 多結局劇情 的文字冒險遊戲。

從日常生活到貼文安排、直播互動與換裝選擇，

每一步都將影響她的成長軌跡，

也可能動搖你們的感情羈絆。

遊戲特色

🌟 甜蜜婚後生活 × Cosplay職業體驗

陪伴她完成每一次拍攝與挑戰，一起養成專屬於你們的角色品牌。

🎮 輕鬆上手的模擬玩法

透過小遊戲完成換裝、攝影與社群經營，

累積粉絲、獲得廠商邀約，邁向百萬人氣。

💌 真實動人的情感分歧

根據你的選擇，故事將走向多種結局：

💖【真結局】人氣爆紅，事業與愛情雙豐收

🌱【佛系經營】平淡結束，回歸日常

👗 豐富的Cos服裝與場景演出

隨遊戲進度解鎖更多造型與場景，打造出獨一無二的攝影作品。

在換裝的過程中，也許會發生一些色色的事...？

- 共有 18組 全動態HCG

data.short_description: 她是熱愛 Cosplay 的人妻，正邁入 20 多歲的最後一年。 這年她立下目標：成為受歡迎的職業 Cosplayer，閃耀於螢光幕前。 而你，是她的丈夫，也是她最重要的夥伴。
data.supported_languages:
繁體中文*, 英文, 日文, 簡體中文*, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i5 10th gen or above
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce® GTX 960 4GB or above
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Windows Compatible Audio Device
  • 備註: dGPU recommended

data.name: My Wife Wants to Be a Professional Cosplayer?!
data.detailed_description:
Intro


"Honey, it's my turn to help you fulfill your dreams. I know you can do this!"

Your wife's almost thirty, and she loves cosplay more than anything. So this year, she made a vow: to try her hand at becoming a professional cosplayer and take the internet by storm!

And you... Well, as her husband, it's your duty to help your hot wife fulfill her dreams! Get ready for a magical journey that blurs the line between dreams and reality. Help your wife run her social media, take pictures, and interact with fans. But beware...for fame and desire don't come without challenges.

My Wife Wants to Be a Professional Cosplayer?! is a text-based adventure game with multiple endings, featuring gameplay that mixes romance simulation with cosplay management.

Daily life choices, planning social media posts, choosing outfits, and interacting with fans on streams... Every choice will affect your wife's dream career, and one wrong step might crack the bond of love between you...

Features

🌟 A Perfect Marriage × Professional Cosplay

Accompany your wife as she takes on the challenge of becoming a professional coser. Take awesome photos and develop your own cosplay brand!

🎮 Easy-to-Learn Simulation Gameplay

Use mini-games to coordinate outfits, shoot photos, and manage social media. Gain fans, attract brand sponsorships, and get millions of followers!

💌 Touching, Emotional Storylines

Experience different endings depending on your choices:

💖 [True Ending] She's a star! Achieve personal and professional success.

🌱 [Chill Ending] We'll never forget this experience... Happily return to your normal life.

👗 Tons of Cosplay Costumes and Sex Scenes

Unlock multiple outfits and sex scenes as the game progresses to create one-of-a-kind photoshoots. Things might get steamy when she's getting dressed up...

- Features 18 sets of fully-animated sex scenes!

data.supported_languages:
Traditional Chinese*, English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese*, Korean
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10+
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i5 10th gen or above
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GeForce® GTX 960 4GB or above
  • DirectX: Version 10
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: Windows Compatible Audio Device
  • Additional Notes: dGPU recommended
